title: Murder Drones OST Disk
description: add 21 music from the OST of the YouTube series
body:
## YOU NEED THE RESOURSE PACK AND THE DATA PACK, PLS WATCH THE TUTO

### heyllo guys, i made a datapack who add 21 music for the web series MURDER DRONES
the list of the music :


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

bite me |
Buddies Chillin’, But Outside |
Buddies Chillin’ |
camping.mp3 |
Click |
Criss-Cross Apple Sauce |
Disassembly Required (Teaser Original Soundtrack) |
Eternal DESTROYER |
Eternal Dream |
Falling With You |
FOREVER |
Get Prommed _3 |
Gimme a Hand |
Murder Brings (Trailer Theme) |
Murder Drones |
Solver Uzi |
The Knife Dance |
Uzi and N_ The Drone Killers |
UZI THE DRONE KILLER |
Whispers in the Sky |
кукла

</details>

⬇️ The Music disk Texture (some have the same texture but not the same music/name) ⬇️
![the disk texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a47b8037d7303cadfae2ff92eb6f325a9d7e20b0.png)

The Tuto : <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/9FSohXmsQlM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

To have them in survival : a skeleton must kill a creeper, the creeper will drop either a custom disc or a basic disc.
